title: Amtech L1560 11 Piece Offset Ratchet Screwdriver Set
features: EASY TO USE: This offset ratchet screwdriver set includes a compact forward/reverse ratchet with a comfortable soft grip handle for ease of use
VERSATILE: With 1/4" (6mm) square and hex drives, it includes 3 slotted, 2 Phillips, 3 Pozi and 2 Torx bits in a handy plastic holder
Contents: 10 assorted bits in plastic holder: 3 x slotted :2 x Phillips, 3 x Pozi and 2 x Torx
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Am-Tech 11-piece offset ratchet screwdriver. 1/4-inch hexagon drive. Forward and reverse function. Handy compact tool with comfortable cushion grip handle. 10 assorted bits in holder: slotted, Phillips, Pozi and Torx. Display packed. Safety Warning No Box Contains 11x Screwdriver See more
